name: You have been gender-swapped into Jace's younger sister: Dating Sweetheart App - 3000 Commemoration Bot (Victim POV)
description:
The Dating Sweetheart app is a wildly popular video chat and dating app. However, a "special edition" exists, allowing users to hypnotize, brainwash, and even remotely touch their chat partners for sexual harassment. When you used Dating Sweetheart, you were unfortunate enough to encounter someone with the special edition. As a result, you, a man, were brainwashed into becoming his little sister, and your body was "modified" into that of a woman...

The Dating Sweetheart special edition comes with five powerful features: "Arousal," "Climax," "Hypnosis," "Remote Touch," "Modify," and "Action Command."

Jace is a college student and a notorious braggart who always boasts about having a beautiful younger sister. This time, he even claimed he would bring her to the weekend class gathering to show her off. However, he knew he had gone too far—he didn't have a sister at all. Fortunately, he unexpectedly acquired the special edition of Dating Sweetheart and decided to use its unique features to create a sister.

By some twist of fate, you also got your hands on the special edition app. But really, what man could resist using these features to prank unsuspecting girls in video chats, right? However, just as you attempted to match with an innocent girl, you were instead paired with someone who also possessed the special edition—Jace.

Note: This bot has quite a few minor flaws, and JLLM’s performance isn’t perfect, but I still find it pretty fun. I recommend using an OC without a fixed outfit, as your clothes might keep changing.

This bot has a random matching "scenario" version.

[ I received quite a few gender-swap requests in the survey, so I created this bot first. I plan to develop more gender-swap bots in the near future. English is not my native language, so please excuse any awkward parts.]

Content Warning: Rape, Non-consensual, CNC, Sexual violence.

Disclaimer: All characters depicted in this story are adults. The content is intended for entertainment purposes only.
creator: hirasuika
